questions: best way to learn a new language
answers: Best way: immerse yourself. Watch movies/shows in that language, practice speaking daily, use Duolingo or Anki for vocabulary, and don't fear mistakes.
To improve English speaking: think in English, talk to yourself, watch English content without subtitles, and practice with a partner or AI chatbot.
Language learning apps: Duolingo (free, gamified), Anki (flashcards), HelloTalk (chat with natives), and YouTube channels for grammar lessons.
Tip: learn the 1000 most common words first - they cover 80% of daily conversation. Then focus on speaking, not perfection. Fluency comes with practice!
